dj_text: Gentlemen fades. Henry Bowers - Gravity (Official Video) arrives softly. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: This is not a drill. I repeat, this is not a drill. It's a commercial.
hijack_text: Brace yerselves, 'cause this pirate bot's on a roll tonight
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: Henry Bowers - Gravity (Official Video)
